title: Marine Aurora 20-pcs Stainless Steel S-Hooks, Heavy Duty S-Shaped Hanging Hooks for Kitchen Utensils, Bedroom, Office & Garden - Rust-Resistant, Non-Deforming Metal (Silver)
features: ❀Package Include: You will receive 20pcs silver s hooks for hanging, enough for your backup or replacement. The length of s-hook is 6cm/2.41inch.
❀Rust-proof: Our heavy duty S-hooks are made of high-quality stainless steel, so you don't have to worry about rusting after long-term use.
❀Anti-Scratch: Our s hooks for hanging have sleek edges and smooth curves, so you don't need to worry about scratching your hands or items.
❀Wide Application: S-hooks are suitable for hanging kitchen utensils, clothes, handbags, scarves or for hanging plant baskets, carillons, lanterns, etc.
❀Space Saving: These s hook are a simple and brilliant storage solution for hanging anything in your kitchen, closet, workshop or garage where space is limited.
❀High Load Capacity: Each hook supports up to 15 kg, securely holding pots, tools and heavy items
❀Satisfaction Guarantee: Contact us for any issues with prompt 24-hour response
description: Product Description silver with elegant appearance, help you free from annoyance of disordered things. Organizing Your Kitchen, Room, Garage! it's also suitable for wardrobes, storage rooms, bathrooms, garages, shops and offices S-Hook Specifications: Material: Heavy Duty metal iron Color: silver Weight: 9 g per piece Length: 2.4 inches /6 cm Maximum Bearing Weight: 22 lb / 10 kg Package Includes: 20 x S Shaped Hooks S-Hook Exquisite Durable Beautiful A box containing 20 S-shaped hooks
